title: Sprint 1 — Harness Operations Layer
description: Add the operations layer to the agent-starter-kit: three-tier testing protocol, OWASP-aligned security commandment, structured error recovery, and JSON feature specifications. These four deliverables close the critical gaps identified in the harness engineering GAP analysis against Anthropic and OpenAI best practices.

acceptanceCriteria.description: skills/testing.md exists with frontmatter, Purpose, Procedure (smoke check, T1/T2/T3 tiers, Playwright CLI commands), and Guardrails sections
rules/commandments/security.md exists with scope: all, and covers input validation, least-privilege, secret protection, output sanitization, destructive actions, and dependency verification
skills/error-recovery.md exists with 6 error classes, max-2-retry rule, Capability Gap Report template, and Maestro escalation flow
specs/README.md exists with the JSON schema, field reference, status values, risk level gate table, and rules
personas/coder.md updated to reference skills/testing.md and skills/error-recovery.md in its Playbook
personas/architect.md updated to produce a JSON spec in specs/ as part of plan output
personas/maestro.md updated to pass spec path in task briefs and handle Capability Gap escalations
personas/reviewer.md updated to cross-reference spec acceptance criteria against handoff Test Results
skills/task-tracking.md updated to derive to-do items from specs/*.json acceptanceCriteria and sync status back to the spec
CHANGELOG.md updated with version 0.3.0 entry documenting all Sprint 1 additions
